pageConfig.title: ACLS Certification Classes
pageConfig.meta_description: AHA ACLS courses for clinicians who manage adult cardiovascular emergencies.
pageConfig.intro: Choose Initial, Renewal, or HeartCode, then select a date and time.

compare_mode.label: Need ACLS ASAP? Show all AHA ACLS options

course_options.clarification: Full classroom ACLS Provider certification for first-time or returning ACLS students.
Shorter ACLS renewal path for providers with prior ACLS training.
Complete HeartCode ACLS online first, then attend an in-person skills session.

delivery_help.label: INSTRUCTOR-LED
delivery_help.text: Initial and Renewal ACLS classes are completed in person with an instructor.

delivery_help.label: HEARTCODE
delivery_help.text: HeartCode ACLS begins online and is completed with an in-person skills session.
